[04:02:36 INF] --- PrivatePdfConverter v1.3.0 (commit: b88535eec97d730f1bd4f6d88a3fc3aa83fef887) ---
Usage: ppc [command]

PrivatePdfConverter

Commands:
  dir        Convert all images inside directory to single pdf file.
  merge      Merge pdf files from directory into one pdf file.
  ext        List all valid image extensions.
  img        Convert single image to single pdf file.
  encrypt    Encrypt pdf file with a password.
  logo       Add an image/logo/watermark to a every page of pdf file.

Options:
  -h, --help    Show help message
  --version     Show version
